title: Understand: the fossil record
description: Check your understanding of the fossil record in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

choices.content: the preserved body parts or activities of ancient organisms
the living tissues of modern organisms
the remains of organisms that have recently died

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Fossils are \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: the preserved body parts or activities of ancient organisms
the living tissues of modern organisms
the remains of organisms that have recently died

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these is a fossil?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a preserved body part of an ancient organism
a sample of living tissue from a modern organism
a set of remains from an organism that has recently died

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Fossils found in deeper rock layers are typically \_\_\_\_\_\_ fossils found in shallower layers.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: older than
younger than
the same age as

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Fossils found in shallower rock layers are typically \_\_\_\_\_\_ fossils found in deeper layers.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: younger than
older than
the same age as

assessment_items.question_content:
**Determine if the statement below is true or false.**

>Fossils found in shallower rock layers are typically younger than fossils found in deeper layers.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: true
false

assessment_items.question_content:
**The fossil record shows which of the following long-term trends in organism complexity and diversity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: organism complexity and diversity have increased
organism complexity and diversity have decreased
organism complexity and diversity have stayed roughly the same

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the best word or phrase to fill in the blank.**

>The fossil record shows that, over time, organism complexity and diversity have \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: increased
decreased
stayed roughly the same

assessment_items.question_content:
**According to the fossil record, what has been the long-term trend in organism complexity and diversity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: they have increased
they have decreased
they have stayed roughly the same

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about the fossil record is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The fossil record includes all of the fossils that have been found on Earth.
The fossil record shows that life has existed on Earth for a few thousand years.
The fossil record can show roughly when species appeared but not when they went extinct.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about the fossil record is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The fossil record shows that life has existed on Earth for billions of years.
The fossil record is made up of a subset of the fossils that have been found on Earth.
The fossil record can show roughly when species appeared but not when they went extinct.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which statement about the fossil record is true?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: The fossil record can show when species appeared, and when they went extinct.
The fossil record shows that life has existed on Earth for a few thousand years.
The fossil record is made up of a subset of the fossils that have been found on Earth.
